title: Swapped Diamonds
description: lapis and glow lichen are diamonds and diamonds are stone and deepslate
body:
This resource pack replaces the lapis lazuli ore with the diamond ore, the deepslate lapis lazuli ore with deepslate diamond ore, glow lichen with diamond gemstone, the deepslate diamond ore with deepslate, and the diamond ore with stone.

This pack is **great** to troll friends.

Totally needed disclaimer - I am not liable for you losing friends over this
